items.name: Nexus Alloy
items.description: A refined alloy produced only in Nexus Core foundries. Symbol of Concordium engineering.

items.name: Cradle Glass
items.description: Translucent fragments harvested from the Inner Cradle. Prized by Concordium artificers.

items.name: Aethel-Infused Steel Ore
items.description: Steel ore saturated with Aethel energy from proximity to Cradle zones.

items.name: Concordium Seal
items.description: A certified Concordium crafting seal. Required for high-grade Concordium equipment.

items.name: Resonance Crystal
items.description: A crystal that hums with resonant energy. Found in the Resonance Caverns.

items.name: Quantum Lens
items.description: Polished crystal lens from Observatory Spire. Focuses Aethel energy with precision.

items.name: Fractured Prism
items.description: A fractured prism from the Glass Valley. Refracts Aethel light in unusual patterns.

items.name: Arcanum Research Codex
items.description: A data-codex recovered from Arcanum Seeker archives. Contains rare formulae.

items.name: Iron Ingot
items.description: Smelted iron ingot. Standard material for Hegemony-grade weapons and armor.

items.name: Iron Scrap
items.description: Low-grade iron scrap from the Bastion Scrap Field. Can be refined into usable metal.

items.name: Hardened Steel Plate
items.description: Reinforced steel plate from Hegemony military forges. Exceptionally durable.

items.name: Hegemony War Badge
items.description: A badge awarded to veterans of the Iron Hegemony. Symbolizes iron will.

items.name: Coral Resin
items.description: Hardened resin secreted by deep-sea coral organisms near Port Meridian. Waterproof and flexible.

items.name: Smuggler's Alloy
items.description: A black-market alloy of unknown composition. Lightweight and surprisingly strong.

items.name: Jungle Ironwood
items.description: Dense hardwood harvested from the Smuggler Jungle. Rivals iron in toughness.

items.name: Meridian Cipher Key
items.description: A scrambled data key from the Meridian Cartel. Access to restricted material caches.

items.name: Cartel Mastercrafted Token
items.description: Proof of Meridian Cartel master-level crafting authorization.

items.name: Synthetic Fiber
items.description: OmniCorp-manufactured synthetic fiber. Lightweight and resistant to energy damage.

items.name: Nano-Composite Sheet
items.description: A nano-engineered composite material from OmniCorp's Extraction Zone Delta.

items.name: Omni Processor Chip
items.description: A processing chip pulled from decommissioned OmniCorp drones. Has multiple applications.

items.name: Spire Protocol Core
items.description: The core processing unit of a Spire security node. Near-impossible to obtain legally.

items.name: Glowvine Sap
items.description: Luminescent sap harvested from the Glowvine Forest. Has potent magical properties.

items.name: Shard Essence
items.description: Distilled spiritual essence from the Heartwood Altar. Used in Shard-blessed equipment.

items.name: Shardroot Bark
items.description: Bark stripped from Shardroot trees in the swamp. Imbued with latent Aethel energy.

items.name: Sanctum Blessing Stone
items.description: A stone blessed at the Sanctum altar. Channels the power of the Aethel Shard.

items.name: Heartwood Core
items.description: The living core of an ancient Heartwood tree. Thrumming with Shard energy.

items.name: Dune Sandstone
items.description: Compressed sandstone from the Dune Outskirts. Surprisingly heat-resistant.

items.name: Scorched Iron Ore
items.description: Iron ore hardened by intense heat from the Scorched Badlands. Excellent for weapons.

items.name: Kaelen Titanite
items.description: Rare titanite mined from beneath Fortress Kaelen. The backbone of Legion heavy armor.

items.name: Forge Canyon Ember
items.description: A persistent ember stone from Forge Canyon Depths. Never fully extinguishes.

items.name: Kaelen Conquest Seal
items.description: A seal awarded to those who have proven themselves in Fortress Kaelen's trials.

items.name: Machine Parts
items.description: Assorted mechanical components salvaged from decommissioned machinery.

items.name: Field Bandage
items.description: Basic medical dressing for battlefield wounds. Reduces bleeding but not much else.

items.name: Healing Herb
items.description: A naturally occurring herb with mild restorative properties. Common in most biomes.

items.name: Leather Strip
items.description: A thin strip of tanned leather. Useful for basic crafting and repairs.

items.name: Wood Plank
items.description: A rough-hewn wooden plank. Structural material for basic constructions.

items.name: Iron Ore
items.description: Raw iron ore. Smelt it to produce usable ingots.

items.name: Copper Ore
items.description: Raw copper ore with a faint orange-green sheen. Used in electronics and basic alloys.

items.name: Aethel Core
items.description: A stabilised core of condensed Aethel energy. Foundation material for advanced Arcanum gear.

items.name: Full HP Cell
items.description: Fully restores HP. For emergencies only — the cost reflects it.

items.name: Full MP Cell
items.description: Fully restores MP. Extremely rare outside OmniCorp supply chains.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: Cures all Poison and Burn status effects instantly.

items.name: Revive Shard
items.description: A crystallised shard of life force. Revives a downed party member to 50% HP.

items.name: EXP Booster
items.description: Doubles EXP gained for the next 3 battle encounters.

items.name: Stat Reset Token
items.description: Grants a free respec of all allocated stat points. Single use.

items.name: Void Repellent
items.description: Temporarily reduces encounter rate with Void-type enemies by 50% for 10 explores.

items.name: Blessed Oil
items.description: A vial of oil blessed at the Heartwood Altar. Grants +15% healing received for 5 turns.

items.name: Legion Iron Ration
items.description: High-calorie ration pack used by Starforged Legion troops. Restores 40% HP and 20% MP.

items.name: Aethel Incense
items.description: Burning this incense grants the party +10% PER for the next 3 encounters.

items.name: Scramble Grenade
items.description: A Meridian Cartel tech device. Reduces all enemy ATK by 20% for 2 turns when used in battle.

items.name: OmniCorp Nano-Patch
items.description: Microscopic repair bots in a patch. Heals 25% HP over 3 turns. Works on organic and synthetic.
